'''chachushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jockey|jockey]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jockey|jockey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chachushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæchishith|chæchishith]] || [[word:chæchishij|chæchishij]] || [[word:chæchishish|chæchishish]] || [[word:chæchishi|chæchishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chachuchushuth|chachuchushuth]] || [[word:chachuchushuj|chachuchushuj]] || [[word:chachuchushush|chachuchushush]] || [[word:chachuchushu|chachuchushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chachushuth|chachushuth]] || [[word:chachushuj|chachushuj]] || [[word:chachushush|chachushush]] || [[word:chachushu|chachushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chachufshuth|chachufshuth]] || [[word:chachufshuj|chachufshuj]] || [[word:chachufshush|chachufshush]] || [[word:chachufshuf|chachufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chachushuthu|chachushuthu]] || [[word:chachushuju|chachushuju]] || [[word:chachushushu|chachushushu]] || [[word:chachushuku|chachushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chachushuth|chachushuth]] || [[word:chachushuj|chachushuj]] || [[word:chachushush|chachushush]] || [[word:chachushu|chachushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chachushuthul|chachushuthul]] || [[word:chachushujul|chachushujul]] || [[word:chachushushul|chachushushul]] || [[word:chachushukul|chachushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chachushuthuthu|chachushuthuthu]] || [[word:chachushujuju|chachushujuju]] || [[word:chachushushushu|chachushushushu]] || [[word:chachushuku|chachushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chachushuthun|chachushuthun]] || [[word:chachushujun|chachushujun]] || [[word:chachushushun|chachushushun]] || [[word:chachushukun|chachushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chachushuthuoro|chachushuthuoro]] || [[word:chachushujuoro|chachushujuoro]] || [[word:chachushushuoro|chachushushuoro]] || [[word:chachushukuoro|chachushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
